Guide
Home
Guide

# Release history

All notable changes to this project will be documented in this file.

The format is based on Keep a Changelog (opens new window) and this project adheres to Semantic Versioning (opens new window).

Guiding Principles
  • Changelogs are for humans, not machines.
  • There should be an entry for every single version.
  • The same types of changes should be grouped.
  • Versions and sections should be linkable.
  • The latest version comes first.
  • The release date of each versions is displayed.
  • Mention whether you follow Semantic Versioning.
Types of changes

Changelog entries are classified using the following labels (from keep-a-changelog (opens new window)):

  • Added for new features.
  • Changed for changes in existing functionality.
  • Deprecated for soon-to-be removed features.
  • Removed for now removed features.
  • Fixed for any bug fixes.
  • Security in case of vulnerabilities.

# 2.3.1 (2022-01-02)

# Fixed

  • Fixes bug when a pattern containing an expression after the closing parenthesis (/!(*.d).{ts,tsx}) was incorrectly converted to regexp (9f241ef (opens new window)).

# Changed

  • Some documentation improvements (f81d236 (opens new window), 421e0e7 (opens new window)).

# 2.3.0 (2021-05-21)

# Fixed

  • Fixes bug where file names with two dots were not being matched consistently with negation extglobs containing a star (56083ef (opens new window))

# 2.2.3 (2021-04-10)

# Fixed

  • Do not skip pattern seperator for square brackets (fb08a30 (opens new window)).
  • Set negatedExtGlob also if it does not span the whole pattern (032e3f5 (opens new window)).

# 2.2.2 (2020-03-21)

# Fixed

  • Correctly handle parts of the pattern after parentheses in the scan method (e15b920 (opens new window)).

# 2.2.1 (2020-01-04)

  • Fixes #49 (opens new window), so that braces with no sets or ranges are now propertly treated as literals.

# 2.2.0 (2020-01-04)

  • Disable fastpaths mode for the parse method (5b8d33f (opens new window))
  • Add tokens, slashes, and parts to the object returned by picomatch.scan().

# 2.1.0 (2019-10-31)

  • add benchmarks for scan (4793b92 (opens new window))
  • Add eslint object-curly-spacing rule (707c650 (opens new window))
  • Add prefer-const eslint rule (5c7501c (opens new window))
  • Add support for nonegate in scan API (275c9b9 (opens new window))
  • Change lets to consts. Move root import up. (4840625 (opens new window))
  • closes https://github.com/micromatch/picomatch/issues/21 (766bcb0 (opens new window))
  • Fix "Extglobs" table in readme (eb19da8 (opens new window))
  • fixes https://github.com/micromatch/picomatch/issues/20 (9caca07 (opens new window))
  • fixes https://github.com/micromatch/picomatch/issues/26 (fa58f45 (opens new window))
  • Lint test (d433a34 (opens new window))
  • lint unit tests (0159b55 (opens new window))
  • Make scan work with noext (6c02e03 (opens new window))
  • minor linting (c2a2b87 (opens new window))
  • minor parser improvements (197671d (opens new window))
  • remove eslint since it... (07876fa (opens new window))
  • remove funding file (8ebe96d (opens new window))
  • Remove unused funks (cbc6d54 (opens new window))
  • Run eslint during pretest, fix existing eslint findings (0682367 (opens new window))
  • support noparen in scan (3d37569 (opens new window))
  • update changelog (7b34e77 (opens new window))
  • update travis (777f038 (opens new window))
  • Use eslint-disable-next-line instead of eslint-disable (4e7c1fd (opens new window))

# 2.0.7 (2019-05-14)

  • 2.0.7 (9eb9a71 (opens new window))
  • supports lookbehinds (1f63f7e (opens new window))
  • update .verb.md file with typo change (2741279 (opens new window))
  • fix: typo in README (0753e44 (opens new window))

# 2.0.4 (2019-04-10)

# Fixed

  • Readme link fixed (opens new window) by @danez.
  • options.capture now works as expected when fastpaths are enabled. See https://github.com/micromatch/picomatch/pull/12/commits/26aefd71f1cfaf95c37f1c1fcab68a693b037304. Thanks to @DrPizza.

# 2.0.0 (2019-04-10)

# Added

  • Adds support for options.onIgnore. See the readme for details
  • Adds support for options.onResult. See the readme for details

# Breaking changes

  • The unixify option was renamed to windows
  • caching and all related options and methods have been removed

# 1.0.0 (2018-11-05)

  • adds .onMatch option
  • improvements to .scan method
  • numerous improvements and optimizations for matching and parsing
  • better windows path handling

# 0.1.0 - 2017-04-13

First release.
